mapper.select:
select * from ( select rownum rn, I.* from ( select lot_id as lotId, lot_item as lotItem, lot_vendor as lotVendor, lot_work as lotWork, lot_iqty as lotIqty, lot_fqty as lotFqty, lot_mfd as lotMfd, lot_etw as lotEtw, lot_exp as lotExp, lot_qc as lotQc, lot_status as lotStatus, lot_memo as lotMemo, lot_bwhsec as lotBwhsec, lot_awhsec as lotAwhsec from lot
AND lot_status = #{lotStatus}
AND ( UPPER(lot_id) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%') OR UPPER(lot_item) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%') )
ORDER BY lot_id DESC ) I )

SELECT lot_id AS lotId, lot_item AS lotItem, lot_vendor AS lotVendor, lot_work AS lotWork, lot_iqty AS lotIqty, lot_fqty AS lotFqty, lot_mfd AS lotMfd, lot_etw AS lotEtw, lot_exp AS lotExp, lot_qc AS lotQc, lot_status AS lotStatus, lot_memo AS lotMemo, lot_bwhsec AS lotBwhsec, lot_awhsec AS lotAwhsec FROM lot WHERE lot_id = #{lotId}
